# My Portfolio Project Agent

## Project Context
- This is a static HTML portfolio site
- Deployed to Azure Static Web Apps
- GitHub repo: github.com/butcheroo/my-portfolio

## Branch Strategy
- `main` = production (live site)
- `dev` = development (preview URL)
- Always work on dev branch first
- Only merge to main when happy with changes

## Rules
- App files live in the `src/` folder
- Keep HTML simple and clean
- Always remind me to push to dev first, not main
